programme.title: Idolanya Kaum Mendang Mending Jangan Ya Dek Ya!!
programme.desc: Dadang (Jeff Smith) is so obsessed with dangdut singer Jenita Janet that he neglects his work, infuriating his mother. He hitches a ride on a truck to Jakarta to meet his idol, unaware that a local girl named Lilis (Raisya Bawazier) has sneaked along to see the National Monument (Monas). Lilis’s presence turns Dadang’s simple mission into a chaotic disaster.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 11
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: RAKET PENYABET JODOH
programme.desc: Maya (Michelle Ziudith) is in a rush and gets into a fight with Miko (Lucky Perdana) over an ojek. She later discovers that Miko is her new badminton coach. Miko underestimates Maya’s skills, demoting her to the bench and claiming she isn't ready for the main team, sparking a fiery determination in Maya to prove him wrong.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 188
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple living happily and simply in Magelang. They have a daughter, Zahra. Fathir works as a small-scale contractor. programme.title: TOK TOK TOK PAKET JODOH ASYIAPPP
programme.desc: To keep her family financially afloat, Dania secretly participates in dangerous, illegal street races. When her mother uncovers the truth, she fiercely opposes it, terrified that Dania will suffer the same fate as her older brother, who was left paralyzed from a racing accident. Caught between survival and her mother's tears, Dania must find a safer way to make a living

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 16
programme.desc: Dafri has just returned to Indonesia to meet Alina and get engaged. However, the engagement is hindered because Nadia disapproves of Dafri’s relationship with her daughter, Alina. programme.title: LENGAH DIKIT LANGSUNG CHECK OUT CINTAMU
programme.desc: Gita (Ina Marika) is abruptly dumped by her boyfriend the moment he inherits a massive fortune from his late father overseas. Heartbroken and bitter, Gita tries to crash his upcoming wedding. Following the disaster, she crosses paths with Andre (Kevin Hillers), a flashy, eccentric rock musician who playfully teases her about her failed romance. Traumatized by the betrayal, Gita vows to shield her heart, repeatedly rejecting every man who tries to get close to her.

programme.title: MANIS MANIS BAU AMIS TAPI SUKA
programme.desc: Celine (Hana Saraswati) faces a family curse if she refuses to take over her grandmother's fish restaurant. Despite her severe fish phobia, she flees and nearly crashes into Dion (Marcel Chandrawinata), who is carrying a block of fish. The next day, Celine wakes up reeking of raw fish, causing everyone around her to stay far away.

programme.title: Melukis Senja - EP 9
programme.desc: Cinta segi tiga remaja sekolah menengah yang rumit dengan masalah keluarga dan rahsia besar dari masa lalu.

programme.title: Bocey & Friends Live - EP 2
programme.desc: Kumpulan pelawak popular, Bocey kembali beraksi secara langsung dengan sketsa komedi yang menarik. Nantikan siapakah tetamu istimewa yang akan beraksi bersama mereka.

programme.title: Expose Mistik: Kisah Seram - EP 27
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan seram untuk tontonan.

programme.title: Kennot Brain - EP 38
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Siti Ooo Som - EP 3
programme.desc: Program berbentuk permainan yang akan mempertandingkan dua kumpulan selebriti dalam pelbagai acara dan dihoskan oleh Dato' Siti Nurhaliza.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2019 - EP 2
programme.desc: Rancagan yang akan menghiburkan hari anda.

programme.title: Cik Serba Tahu - EP 10
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: 3 dara kg.com - EP 22
programme.desc: 3 Dara nak buat bisnes produk kecantikan sendiri menggunakan modal pinjaman dari Tabung JKK Kampung Kembang Kempis. Mereka ditipu oleh Kulup Q , di mana duit dah dibayar tetapi barang tak dapat.

programme.title: Komediri - EP 3
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan 'Stand Up Comedy' yang mempersembahkan 3 pelawak dan di hoskan oleh Harith Iskander.

programme.title: Punchline DAC S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Frust Gila - EP 10
programme.desc: Frust Gila rancangan permainan penuh cabaran untuk 3 peserta, cabaran di sediakan untuk mendapatkan hanya satu pemenang.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Dato’ AC Mizal kini Kembali Bersama geng latah seperti Eida Moin, PS Mansur, Wan Raja Lawak dan ramai lagi dalam musim terbaru Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat.

programme.title: Kail Pagi Makan Petang - EP 8
programme.desc: Program mengisahkan tentang teknik memancing dan ikuti pengembaran mereka untuk mengetahui ikan yang ditangkap dan masakan menarik yang akan disediakan.

programme.title: Buana Oh Buana - EP 5
programme.desc: Sitcom komedi yang berkisahkan kehidupan masyarakat yang tinggal di kampung dan bandar dengan isu-isu yang berbangkit lakonan Ajak, Yassin dan Shuib

programme.title: Lawak Sorang - Sorang - EP 12
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Melukis Senja - EP 10
programme.desc: Cinta segi tiga remaja sekolah menengah yang rumit dengan masalah keluarga dan rahsia besar dari masa lalu.

programme.title: Akak Akak Sangat - EP 3
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan bual bicara mengenai topik- topik hangat yang akan diperbincangkan dalam keadaan yang kasual.

programme.title: Zero To Millionaire
programme.desc: Ahmad, Hamid dan Mahmud merupakan tiga beradik miskin yang dikerah bekerja di rumah orang tua untuk membayar kos ikat jamin mereka.

programme.title: Siapa Jaga Mak? - EP 3
programme.desc: Diilhamkan oleh kisah-kisah pengasuh yang benar, Siapa Jaga Mak ceritakan tentang empat keluarga yang menghadapi pelbagai emosi daripada penjagaan orang tua.

programme.title: Kuali Terbalik - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah program baru yang menggabungkan elemen drama, komedi dan program masakan dalam satu rancangan. Setiap episod akan menampilkan spoof dari drama terbaik Astro juga dari filem box office

programme.title: Karoot Komedia X SR2 - EP 15
programme.desc: Karoot Komedia adalah sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan oleh pelawak terkenal Malaysia

programme.title: Redah Kasi Pecah Ekstravaganza - EP 4
programme.desc: Redah Kasi Pecah Ekstravaganza musim kedua menampilkan Tauke, Ropi, Zaibo dan ramai lagi meredah kampung-kampung dan melakukan pelbagai aktiviti

programme.title: Life At Thinker - EP 13
programme.desc: Life At Thinker adalah sebuah program vlog atau diari yang memaparkan aktiviti-aktiviti menarik dan kegilaan krew-krew Thinker Studios di sepanjang minggu.

programme.title: RI-OH RIMBA - EP 5
programme.desc: Amir Sisi cabar Hawa, Putera, Ikhmal dan Atu buat cabaran di Kampung Orang Asli?! Macam mana agaknya reaksi mereka dalam Rioh Rimba ni?!

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 9
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang menggabungkan sketsa, spontan, prank, zumba dan lain lain lagi

programme.title: Gelap Geli Tak - EP 8
programme.desc: Game show terbaru di hoskan oleh Faizal Ismail. Peserta bersaing antara satu sama lain dalam pelbagai cabaran, tapi muslihatnya mereka ditempatkan dalam persekitaran gelap gelita

programme.title: RSVP Aku Datang - EP 9
programme.desc: RSVP menonjolkan pelbagai acara dari berbagai kaum diMalaysia dari majlis perkahwinan, majlis aqiqah hinggalah ke majlis Ponggal dan banyak lagi.

programme.title: Spontan Boboi & Kengkawan - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan Spontan kanak-kanak yang di hoskan oleh Afdlin Shauki bersama artist and pelawak jemputan

programme.title: CTDK-ation - EP 3
programme.desc: Program realiti perjalanan Dato Sri Siti Nurhaliza 'VACATION' adalah program menampilkan keluarga besar Dato Sri Siti Nurhaliza.

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong? S4 - EP 2
programme.desc: Panel selebriti memilih jawapan berdasarkan kenyataan dan cerita yang mungkin benar atau tidak, 2 kumpulan berentap untuk perolehi markah tertinggi.

programme.title: Kalau Berani 1 vs 0 - EP 5
programme.desc: Rancagan menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Cik Ayu Mee Sanggul - EP 8
programme.desc: Ayu janda muda yang selalu memakai kebaya tradisional. Dia mengahwini seorang lelaki bernama Akhtar tanpa ikatan cinta agar dapat menjadi ibu kepada anak duda yang ada penyakit Major Thalassemia.

programme.title: Jaguh Kampung 3 - EP 3
programme.desc: Saksikan para peserta yang mewakili kampung masing masing bertanding dalam acara memasak dengan menu ala kampung.

programme.title: Melukis Senja - EP 10

programme.title: Kail Pagi Makan Petang - EP 9
programme.desc: Program mengisahkan tentang teknik memancing dan ikuti pengembaran mereka untuk mengetahui ikan yang ditangkap dan masakan menarik yang akan disediakan.

programme.title: Buana Oh Buana - EP 6
programme.desc: Sitcom komedi yang berkisahkan kehidupan masyarakat yang tinggal di kampung dan bandar dengan isu-isu yang berbangkit lakonan Ajak, Yassin dan Shuib

programme.title: Lawak Sorang - Sorang - EP 13
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Melukis Senja - EP 11
programme.desc: Cinta segi tiga remaja sekolah menengah yang rumit dengan masalah keluarga dan rahsia besar dari masa lalu.

programme.title: Akak Akak Sangat - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan bual bicara mengenai topik- topik hangat yang akan diperbincangkan dalam keadaan yang kasual.

programme.title: Mael Totey
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda naif berusaha bersungguh-sungguh mempelajari bahasa Inggeris agar dapat menawan hati gadis idamannya namun sebaliknya dia jatuh cinta dengan gurunya.

programme.title: Siapa Jaga Mak? - EP 4
programme.desc: Diilhamkan oleh kisah-kisah pengasuh yang benar, Siapa Jaga Mak ceritakan tentang empat keluarga yang menghadapi pelbagai emosi daripada penjagaan orang tua.

programme.title: Kuali Terbalik Special - EP 1
programme.desc: Edisi Istimewa Lawak Siang dan Malam bersama Kuali Terbalik

programme.title: Karoot Komedia X SR2 - EP 16
programme.desc: Karoot Komedia adalah sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan oleh pelawak terkenal Malaysia

programme.title: Redah Kasi Pecah Ekstravaganza - EP 6
programme.desc: Redah Kasi Pecah Ekstravaganza musim kedua menampilkan Tauke, Ropi, Zaibo dan ramai lagi meredah kampung-kampung dan melakukan pelbagai aktiviti

programme.title: Life At Thinker - EP 14
programme.desc: Life At Thinker adalah sebuah program vlog atau diari yang memaparkan aktiviti-aktiviti menarik dan kegilaan krew-krew Thinker Studios di sepanjang minggu.

programme.title: Gerak Geri GenZ - EP 5
programme.desc: Sebuah eksplorasi 4 sahabat remaja perempuan Cik B, Ara, Alyssa dan Qadejah di Turki. Mereka menelusuri kota bersejarah dan budaya.

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 11
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang menggabungkan sketsa, spontan, prank, zumba dan lain lain lagi

programme.title: Gelap Geli Tak - EP 9
programme.desc: Game show terbaru di hoskan oleh Faizal Ismail. Peserta bersaing antara satu sama lain dalam pelbagai cabaran, tapi muslihatnya mereka ditempatkan dalam persekitaran gelap gelita

programme.title: RSVP Aku Datang - EP 10
programme.desc: RSVP menonjolkan pelbagai acara dari berbagai kaum diMalaysia dari majlis perkahwinan, majlis aqiqah hinggalah ke majlis Ponggal dan banyak lagi.

programme.title: Muka Buku - EP 1
programme.desc: Muka Buku ialah rancangan permainan teka-teki, di mana selebriti perlu meneka antara empat peserta, siapa yang palsu dan siapa yang Muka Buku Sebenar.

programme.title: CTDK-ation - EP 4
programme.desc: Program realiti perjalanan Dato Sri Siti Nurhaliza 'VACATION' adalah program menampilkan keluarga besar Dato Sri Siti Nurhaliza.

programme.title: Sorry, Sengaja! - EP 9
programme.desc: Rancangan "prank" yang berlaku di pejabat Astro, melibatkan pekerja-pekerja yang selalunya tidak menjangka akan sesuatu berlaku. Rancangan ini dikepalai oleh beberapa "prankster" dari Thinker Studios.

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 3
programme.desc: Program ini akan menguji daya ingatan para selebriti popular tanah air sama ada mereka masih ingat akan peristiwa atau kejadian aneh & pelik yang berlaku dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Cik Ayu Mee Sanggul - EP 9
programme.desc: Ayu janda muda yang selalu memakai kebaya tradisional. Dia mengahwini seorang lelaki bernama Akhtar tanpa ikatan cinta agar dapat menjadi ibu kepada anak duda yang ada penyakit Major Thalassemia.

programme.title: Jaguh Kampung 3 - EP 4
programme.desc: Saksikan para peserta yang mewakili kampung masing masing bertanding dalam acara memasak dengan menu ala kampung.

programme.title: baikpunya - EP 5
programme.desc: Program ini akan membawa anda dalam perjalanan untuk mengetahui tempat-tempat tersembunyi dan tempat-tempat popular di Malaysia yang disyorkan oleh penduduk tempatan.

programme.title: The Maid 2 - EP 9
programme.desc: Suhana, Nadia, dan Fika baru saja diceraikan Jay. Harta mereka telah berpindah milik kepada Jay setelah Jay berjaya pedayakan mereka tandatangani surat yang mereka tidak tahu pun isi kandungannya.

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 7
programme.desc: Ikmal terkejut dengan keputusan Rihanna yang tidak mahu meneruskan majlis pertunangannya. Ishak datang dan mendakwa keluarga Mona telah menculik Arif.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti - EP 2
programme.desc: Selepas ditinggalkan Siti, Pok Ya tidak berhasrat untuk mencarinya sehinggalah mendapat tahu Siti sedang mengandungkan anaknya. Misi menjejaki Siti semakin tegang setelah mengetahui dia sebenarnya diculik!

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 9
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Rahsia Hati Perempuan - EP 12
programme.desc: Mikael, Zayn & Ilaina adalah kawan baik semenjak kecil. Ilaina dan keluarga telah berpindah ke Australia. Berputik cinta antara mereka dan siapakah Arissa?

programme.title: DramaVaganza: Dendam Cinta Arissa - EP 27
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.title: Bunga Hati - EP 15
programme.desc: Seorang gadis miskin berdepan dengan konflik antara ibu yang membencinya dan abangnya yang cacat serta terperangkap dalam cinta tiga segi antara kekasih pertama dan doktor jutawan.

programme.title: See You Again
programme.desc: Masih terperangkap di masa lalu dengan kenangan arwah isterinya, See You Again memaparkan kisah pahit manis antara seorang duda dan seorang gadis yang mengingatkannya tentang dia.

programme.title: Lagi Riuh... Macam Macam Aznil - EP 1
programme.desc: Dato' Aznil Haji Nawawi kini kembali dalam musim terbaru Lagi Riuh Macam Macam Aznil, lebih riuh, lebih meriah and lebih menghiburkan.

programme.title: Mr London Ms Langkawi - EP 11
programme.desc: Aidid yang di besarkan di luar negara bertemu sepupunya Nana, yang berjiwa besar cintakan tanah air. Walaupun mereka sering berselisih pendapat namun akhirnya disatukan atas kehendak keluarga.

programme.title: Kak Kek Ke Kelate - EP 1
programme.desc: Kak Kek, alter ego Catriona Ross akan menjelajah ke Kelantan untuk mencari makanan viral di Kelantan di samping membawa penonton meneroka keunikan dan tempat menarik yang ada.

programme.title: Rahsia Hati Perempuan - EP 13
programme.desc: Mikael, Zayn & Ilaina adalah kawan baik semenjak kecil. Ilaina dan keluarga telah berpindah ke Australia. Berputik cinta antara mereka dan siapakah Arissa?

programme.title: Tiada Hari yang Tak Indah - EP 7
programme.desc: Kisah tentang kehidupan keluarga Hj. Zainal yang mempunyai 3 orang anak perempuan dengan perwatakan yang berbeza. Mereka menghadapi masalah seperti hal keluarga, percintaan, dan persahabatan.

programme.title: 10 Tips Tipu Bini

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: Radhe, a merciless contract killer, falls for simple Jhanvi, who challenges his dark world and forces him to choose between love, redemption, and his violent life. Release Year: 2009 Director: Prabhu Deva

programme.title: Sam Bahadur
programme.desc: Witness the exemplary story of Sam Manekshaw, who led a new India through 3 major wars until 1971 and became the 1st-ever Indian Army officer to get promoted to the rank of India's 1st field marshal. Release Year: 2023 Director: Meghna Gulzar Awards: 2024 Winner Technical Award- Best Cinematography- Jay I. Patel

programme.title: Right Yaaa Wrong
programme.desc: A decorated and disabled Police Officer becomes suspect in a double homicide. Director: Neeraj Pathak Release Year: 2010 Director: Neeraj Pathak

programme.title: Kalyug
programme.desc: A newly married couple is caught on camera during their honeymoon. When the wife commits suicide after the video is released on internet, the husband sets out to seek revenge. Release Year: 2005 Director: Mohit Suri Awards: 2006 Winner Jury's Choice- Superstar of Tomorrow - Male- Kunal Kemmu

programme.title: Commando 3
programme.desc: The commando, Karanveer Singh Dogra, is approached to chase and catch an Indian criminal gang, who pose a threat to India itself. Release Year: 2019 Director: Aditya Datt

programme.title: Dil Juunglee
programme.desc: The movie is a romantic comedy that displays the ups and downs in Sumit and Karol's relationship. Release Year: 2018 Director: Aleya Sen

programme.title: Middle Class Love
programme.desc: A young college boy is frustrated being in middle-class family setup and finds love the ideal way to get out of it. Release Year: 2022 Director: Ratnaa Sinha

programme.title: Krrish 3
programme.desc: Krrish and his father must defeat human-animal mutants created by an evil genius, Kaal, who is hell-bent on destroying the world. His vile army is led by a chameleon mutant, Kaya. Release Year: 2013 Director: Rakesh Roshan Awards: Apsara Film Producers Guild Awards- Hall of Fame, Best Special Effects-Redchillies.VFX . Awards of the International Indian Film Academy- Best Action, Best Special Effects,

programme.title: 1920 London
programme.desc: After her husband becomes possessed by an evil spirit, a noble woman turns to her former lover to perform an exorcism. Release Year: 2016 Director: Tinu Suresh Desai

programme.title: Khiladi 420
programme.desc: Ritu marries Dev Kumar, but after her father's death, her growing suspicion reveals Dev's hidden darkness, turning love into fear as disturbing truths surface. Release Year: 2000 Director: Neeraj Vora Awards: 3 nominations

programme.title: Dil Juunglee
programme.desc: The movie is a romantic comedy that displays the ups and downs in Sumit and Karol's relationship. Release Year: 2018 Director: Aleya Sen

programme.desc: A young college boy is frustrated being in middle-class family setup and finds love the ideal way to get out of it. Release Year: 2022 Director: Ratnaa Sinha

programme.title: Khushi
programme.desc: Khushi and Karan share a love hate relationship. Whilst setting their friends up in a relationship, they themselves end up connecting romantically. Release Year: 2003 Director: S. J. Surya

programme.title: Mujhe Kucch Kehna Hai
programme.desc: An accident brings Karan and Pooja close to each other. When Karan finally decides to propose to her, he realises that destiny has other plans for them. Release Year: 2001 Director: Satish Kaushik Awards: Zee Cine Awards: Best Debut Male: TuSShar Kapoor.

programme.title: Don Aur Doctor
programme.desc: An honest doctor, Das, befriends Deva, a feared gangster. But when duty clashes with loyalty, their strong friendship faces a heartbreaking test.

programme.title: Commando 3
programme.desc: The commando, Karanveer Singh Dogra, is approached to chase and catch an Indian criminal gang, who pose a threat to India itself. Release Year: 2019 Director: Aditya Datt

programme.title: Secret Superstar
programme.desc: Insia, an ambitious young girl, dreams of becoming a singer but faces opposition from her father. Undeterred, she strives to follow her passion by anonymously posting her songs on the Internet.

programme.title: A.aa 2
programme.desc: Mohan falls in love with Megha, who lives in the United States. Later, they get separated because of some circumstances, but it turns out that destiny has other plans for them.

programme.title: Gair
programme.desc: An abandoned child raised by a wealthy family takes over the family business. He is resented by their natural son who, fueled by a bitter uncle, tries his best to make him lose face.

programme.title: The Making Of Mubarakan
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Extraa Shots- Befikre
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: 12th Fail
programme.desc: IPS officer Manoj Kumar Sharma embarks on a fearless journey to restart his academic pursuit, aiming to conquer the world's toughest competitive exam.

programme.title: Extraa Shots Ludo
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Chehre
programme.desc: An 80-year-old man with a penchant for real life games in a story about rights and wrongs.

programme.title: Maachis
programme.desc: Jaswant is arrested for a crime he did not commit. On seeing his friend's condition, Kripal joins an extremist group to bring down the government.

programme.title: Shivrayancha Chaava
programme.desc: Aurangzeb aims to make Burhanpur a southern capital and appoints Bahadur Khan, who oppresses the people. Unable to tolerate this, Chhatrapati Sambhaji Maharaj intervenes to liberate the people.

programme.title: Meri Pyaari Bindu
programme.desc: Childhood friends Abhimanyu and Bindu face friction when she realises that she doesn't love him after a brief relationship. Years later, Abhimanyu decides to pen a story based on his life.

programme.title: Kantara
programme.desc: When greed paves the way for betrayal, scheming and murder, a young tribal reluctantly dons the traditions of his ancestors to seek justice.

programme.title: Phir Aayi Hasseen Dillruba
programme.desc: Escaping from the police in Agra, Rani and Rishu decide to elope together. When their plan goes awry, Rani seeks a helping hand from a kind admirer.

programme.title: Aankh Micholi
programme.desc: Three cousins, Laadli Chibber, Bajrang Das Khatri and Shikhar Randhawa, embrace the warmth of a new city when they move to Mumbai, but they also face challenges that transform their lives.

programme.title: Colour Photo
programme.desc: Jayakrishna and Deepthi are engineering students whose backgrounds differ greatly from each other. However, circumstances bring them together and make them fall in love.

programme.title: Pratikar
programme.desc: Krishna embarks on a quest to avenge the tragic death of his foster sister. However, things take an unexpected turn when his foster brother begins to pursue him for taking the law into his own hands.

programme.title: Metro In Dino
programme.desc: The bittersweet stories of four urban-dwelling couples intertwine as they navigate the complexities and joys of relationships in modern-day India.

programme.title: Kuch Naa Kaho
programme.desc: A secretary's manager tells her to find a match for his nephew who does not want to get married. The nephew rejects every proposal and falls in love with the secretary instead.

programme.title: Shakti
programme.desc: Ashwini, an honest policeman, refuses to trade a captured gangster for his son Vijay's release after a ruthless gangster kidnaps him. Vijay grows up resenting his father and turns to a life of crime.

programme.title: Lagaan
programme.desc: During the British Raj, a farmer named Bhuvan accepts the challenge of Captain Andrew Russell to beat his team in a game of cricket and enable his village to not pay taxes for the next three years.

programme.title: It's My Life
programme.desc: Abhishek is a young man from a wealthy family whose life has always been controlled by his overbearing father. However, he soon decides to stand up to him after falling in love with a woman.

programme.title: Mubarakan
programme.desc: Identical twin brothers turn to their eccentric uncle for help to make sure that they each marry the woman they love.

programme.title: Chhorii 2
programme.desc: When a supernatural cult abducts her seven-year-old daughter, Sakshi must rescue her, while fighting the deep-rooted societal injustices that continue to haunt her and the young woman around her

programme.desc: Saravannan begins anew after marrying Kavitha, but his fresh start unravels into turmoil when his friend Mani returns, bringing unexpected challenges with him. Release Year: 2022 Director: V. J. Gopinath

programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: A group of disgraced yet highly-skilled operatives hope to seek redemption as they take on dangerous covert missions and fight against the enemy they unwittingly uncovered.

programme.desc: An undercover agent goes on a dangerous mission to bring down a crime ring. Fuelled by a bitter and painful past, Apollo and his allies face the gruelling task that will challenge his resolve and strength.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: This mystery-thriller series revolves around an alluring woman named Juliana and her illicit affair with Alex, a lawyer who also happens to be the brother of Juliana's husband, Victor, a washed-up boxer. What is the story behind Juliana's betrayal and infidelity?

programme.title: Cesar Wagner - EP 6
programme.desc: In the Vosges forest the authorities find the lifeless body of a journalist and animal rights activist, along with that of a lynx. The local hunters immediately become the prime suspects. A tragedy that exacerbates an already virulent conflict between hunters and the animal rights movement.

programme.title: Fleuve En Eaux Troubles - EP 4
programme.desc: The retreat of the coastline, worsened by climate change, is rallying specialists seeking solutions to protect shores and reduce impacts on coastal ecosystems.

programme.title: Maman A Disparu
programme.desc: Louise and Celine, two sisters separated by life, meet again after the suspicious disappearance of their mother. As the local police investigate the case, the sisters, despite their very different characters, are convinced that she didn't just disappear without reason and decide to work together on their own investigation.

programme.title: Le Grand Jt Des Territoires
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.desc: Host Zoe Brunet and Adrien cross the Tarentaise by mountain bike and kayak. From Val d'Isere to Bourg-Saint-Maurice, they criss-cross the Vanoise National Park in a sumptuous Alpine setting.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil - EP 1848
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. programme.desc: Sisko, a recently arrived Australian shepherd, meets potential adopters. Aurelie visits Poly the cat, who is very cuddly after his surgery. Meanwhile, Tiffany and Christophe take Joy and Bebe for an animal assisted therapy session in a retirement home.

programme.desc: To celebrate the cuisine of the French overseas departments and territories, make a date with each episode featuring a personality from the world of gastronomy. On the menu: discoveries, sharing, and an explosion of flavours!

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 14
programme.desc: The Albert-Kahn museum unveils the banker's humanist project. Sometimes called ''the time folder'', Simone Pheulpin works with cotton ribbon. For his first show at Dries Van Noten, Julian Klausner plays with textures and colours. Sophie Brillouet's studio is alive with beach air.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique - EP 50

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres - EP 47

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres - EP 48

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Cosy, Le Mag Deco - EP 3
programme.desc: Caroline Boeglin goes in search of astonishing lodgings. She shares her love of finding objects in antique markets, her DIY ideas and her interior design touch that transforms a room. Decoration and renovation are the key words for her discoveries.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil - EP 1849

programme.title: Contact - EP 1
programme.desc: Georges St-Pierre is considered one of the most complete mixed martial arts athletes on the planet. He talks about his victory in 2004, which left him with ''a false sense of confidence'' and the reasons for his recent depression.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Le Jardin Extraordinaire - EP 7
programme.desc: 60 years of travelling across all continents, to every corner of the world. 60 years recounting life on Earth! For the Garden's anniversary: exceptional archives, never before seen and fabulous images, and behind the scenes of the show...

programme.title: Tendance XXI - EP 13
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: On Acheve Bien Les Chevaux
programme.desc: Bruno Bouche, Clement Hervieu-Leger and Daniel San Pedro take on Horace McCoy's noir novel about dance marathons in the United States in 1929, where participants were prepared to dance to death. 32 dancers, 9 actors and 4 musicians in a visceral, out-of-this-world dance-theatre experience.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 11
programme.desc: Sourdough breads, brioches and generous recipes are the keys to his success on social networks. Known under the pseudonym Cook as you feel it, Kodjo is a self-taught cook who arrived from Togo in France. A father and inspiring creator, he turns a childhood passion into a space for emancipation.

programme.title: Cesar Wagner - EP 6
programme.desc: In the Vosges forest the authorities find the lifeless body of a journalist and animal rights activist, along with that of a lynx. The local hunters immediately become the prime suspects. A tragedy that exacerbates an already virulent conflict between hunters and the animal rights movement.

programme.title: Secrets Des Profondeurs - EP 4
programme.desc: Sam and Mario set off in search of the ships torpedoed by the Germans just off the Newfoundland coast during the Second World War.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. programme.title: En Marge Du Monde - EP 1
programme.desc: Felix trained as a lawyer before leaving the fast-moving life of Montreal behind him to answer the call of the wild and become a hunter-gatherer in Chibougamau forest. With no running water, he learnt to live in almost total self-sufficiency while respecting nature. A remote life which suits him perfectly.

programme.title: Anushan

programme.title: Movie - Ayan
programme.desc: Deva works for Arumugam, a smuggler, who has taken care of him for many years. However, when his best friend gets killed, Deva decides to help the police to nab a dangerous drug lord.

programme.title: Movie - Mirugam
programme.desc: Ayyanar is a womanising, savage man who beats up innocents and rapes women. He marries the pretty Alagamma who first hates him but later decides to transform him. But, his sinful past soon catches up.

programme.title: Movie - Thaali Dhaanam
programme.desc: Sridhar's mother gets him married to Kalyani, a kind and generous woman. Though they have a happy married life for 12 years, Kalyani is devastated when she is unable to become a mother.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Movie - AVMin Puthumai Penn
programme.desc: Cast - Pandian,Revathy

programme.title: Movie - KaruppaSamy Kuthagaitharar
programme.desc: Life goes on for the protagonist until Meenakshi stumbles upon in his life. An aspiring medical student, she relates Karan's benevolence to her late mother's. Soon after, they both become victim of the stupid cupid's bait.

programme.title: Movie - Indru Nee Naalai Naan
programme.desc: Pazhaniappa, an innocent villager, finds a beautiful bride for his brother, Marudhu, an active politician. Tragedy sets in after Marudhu becomes a drunkard and dies because he loses in the elections

programme.title: Movie - Thenkasi Pattinam
programme.desc: Kannan is in love with his childhood friend Meenakshi but keeps it a secret from his beloved friend Das. However, the friendship between them is ruined as Das falls in love with the same girl.

programme.title: Movie - Kizhakku Cheemayile
programme.desc: A brother shares a close bond with his sister and is ecstatic to see her get married. However, problems arise when his new brother-in-law disapproves of the sibling relationship.

programme.title: Movie - Sondhakaran
programme.desc: A vengeful criminal frames a policeman for sexual assault. After serving his sentence, he starts working as a watchman and saves residents of a building from a fraudster who runs a chit fund.

programme.title: Movie - Thai Pongal
programme.desc: Janaki loses her husband early in her life and is left with a girl child. Without any support, she experiences tough situations involving lecherous men. She meets Vairam who supports her.

programme.title: Movie - Thathi Thavuthu Manasu
programme.desc: Three village girls who yearn to taste the big city life get to attend a friend's wedding in Chennai. But their joy comes to a halt when their money is stolen, leaving them stranded.

programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Movie - Maha Nadigan
programme.desc: Sathya, a junior artiste, manages to secure a chance to play a hero in a movie. As his fame gradually increases, he is ambitious to become the chief minister of the state.

programme.title: Movie - Thaaikulamae Thaaikulamae
programme.desc: While on a business tour, circumstances force a married man to marry another woman. However, his first wife happens to learn about his second marriage.

programme.title: Movie - Pennin Manathai Thottu
programme.desc: A heart surgeon is loved by everyone in his family. A woman and a kid with a heart problem arrive at his house, but when she learns the identity of the doctor, she refuses to let the child have an operation performed by him.

programme.title: Movie - Majunu
programme.desc: Vasanth, son of an MP, falls in love with Heena, who is believed to be the main suspect behind a bomb attack on his father. Vasanth secretly helps her return to Kolkata and soon follows to meet her.

programme.title: Movie - MaaVeeran
programme.desc: Harsha is falsely implicated for killing Indu's father and she too is kidnapped. But Harsha and Indu share a bond from a previous life, and when he realises this, he sets out to set things straight.

programme.title: HSBC BWF World Tour 2026
programme.desc: The German Open is an annual badminton tournament, held since 1955. Organized by the German Badminton Association, it is a key European stop featuring top international players, held at the Westenergie Sporthalle in Mülheim.

programme.title: Davis Cup Qualifiers 2026
programme.desc: Catch all the triumphant moments from the 13 winning teams who are through to the second round of qualifiers.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Delray Beach Open is a professional tennis tournament held at the Delray Beach Tennis Center in Florida on outdoor hard courts. It was founded in 1993 in Coral Springs before moving to Delray Beach in 1999. It has become a premier event, attracting over 60,000 spectators annually.

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026
programme.desc: The Tour de la Provence is an annual early-season professional road cycling stage race held in the Provence region of southern France. The race is historically connected to the local French newspaper La Provence.

programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 Highlights
programme.desc: Catch all the thrills and spills from the Khalifa International Tennis and Squash Complex in Doha, Qatar.

programme.title: ATP Tour Review Show 2026
programme.desc: A look back at the 123rd edition of the historic grass-court event from the Queen's Club in London, United Kingdom.

The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.desc: The Italian Open is the men's national open golf championship of Italy. It was founded in 1925. programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. programme.title: PL GOATS - EP 2
programme.desc: Italy has provided some of the greatest players to ever grace the Premier League. programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 1
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage. Featuring Matheus Cunha, Granit Xhaka, Florian Wirtz and Antoine Semenyo.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 77
programme.desc: The Teletubbies say goodnight to the Tiddlytubbies; it is sleepybyes time. But Po isn't tired anymore and goes for a special ride on her scooter.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 11
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'orange', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see an orange orange, some slices, a tasty one and meet a juicy orange! There's an orange winning a football match and one spinning all around. The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 9
programme.desc: Messy can see something amazing outside his window. A beautiful arch of colours magically appears across the sky. He finds out more.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 48
programme.desc: Everyone wants to win Swoppiton's hide-and-seek tournament. But Mojo and Bo accidentally break the prize. They need to put it back together without the seeker spotting them!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 1
programme.desc: Bluey is excited to get her own room. But when bed time comes, she misses Bingo more than she expected and must find a way to stay in touch with her sister.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 47
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 2
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone they think is Enid, only much too big... Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid! Of course, the Squirrels want their faces painted too, so Duggee sets to it.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 1
programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: A Giant Grandmaster Glitch means BIG trouble for the Giant's Causeway - can the Go Jetters stop him in his tracks?

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 42
programme.desc: It's time for a family game of hide and seek. Everyone hides, while Bluey counts to twenty, but will she be able to stay focused on the game and not get distracted by all her toys.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 45
programme.desc: Mum helps Bluey and Bingo find ways to entertain themselves on a family road trip, while Dad tries to stay ahead of the grey nomad convoy or risk camping near the toilets.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 13
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 14
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 36
programme.desc: When Andy mistakenly eats a bowl of exotic fruit salad that Mr Hammond left for the black crested macaques, Andy jets off to Sulawesi in search of more.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Bella plays with her favourite cup - it makes the perfect drum for a sing along with Lift. Together, they visit Kingsley and Queenie who play the 'Tea Party Dash', but who will win?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 17
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels bake a pie and learn how to share by dividing things between everyone equally.

programme.desc: The Squirrels think about life's big questions, helping Tino the artistic mouse escape a crisis of confidence and gaining their Philosophy badges in the process.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 47

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 13
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'present', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different presents - a wrapped-up present, one with a bow, another for a birthday and a present to make you feel better. There are some for parties, one made by a squirrel and another that is just because! The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 11
programme.desc: Messy monster can't work out why his cart won't move. The wheels just won't go round like normal. Off he goes to OKIDO to find out why.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 50

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 3
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 2
programme.desc: Mum sets up a backyard obstacle course just for fun, but Dad wants to race! Now the kids are determined to win by any means necessary.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 4
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part. First, they need to find their talents. After they spend some time searching, Narrator explains that 'finding their talents' means working out what they are good at. So, the Squirrels practise their skills until they are ready to face an audience.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 3
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. No worries, the Squirrels can run after him and give it back. They take all sorts of transport to catch Rhodri, and he is always one step ahead. Until finally, they're on a raft across the sea and land right by Rhodri's front door.

While on a no-holds barred quest to get Kate her favorite cupcakes, Melman learns the gift doesn’t matter, as long as it comes from the heart.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Kelp has a new trick with his bubbles: he can have his friends put voice messages inside that you hear when you pop them. But when Pixie decides she doesn’t want the others to hear what’s in her bubble, the chase is on to rescue it! / Juniper is devastated when the traditional ceremony to celebrate her next level of spark achievement can’t happen. Kelp helps introduce a new tradition.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Kelp writes a song about him and Scallop to perform at the unicorn show. But when it comes time, Scallop wants to keep the song “just for them”, leaving Kelp to come up with anew act- and fast! / The kids all visit the magical musical plant greenhouse on Unicorn Land. They each pick a plant to take care of, and for Kelp it’s a sad, almost dead plant that he falls in love with.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: When the townsfolk decorate the Harmony Harbor holiday tree but lose the treetop star, TZG secretly search for it in the yard of a notoriously scary house. / When it transpires the house is not-so-scary after all and belongs to shy inventor Dr. Greenlittle, TZG secretly leads her to the big Harmony Harbor sing-along so that she doesn't have to spend the holiday alone.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: When Ian starts to sleepwalk around Harmony Harbor, TZG secretly guides him back to his own bed where he can continue sleeping safely. / When Felicia wants to run an obstacle course for the first time but is afraid she’ll embarrass herself, TZG secretly boosts her confidence by helping with practice.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: When Melman loses his first tooth, he fears he won't be Kate's baby anymore and goes on a city-wide chase to recover his tooth before Kate can replace him with a younger, cuter animal.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 22

With the help of all the Gabby Cats, they water the Singing Flowers, help the Rainbow Kitty Bushes regain their color, and sing some fussy Itty Bitty Blossoms a lullaby. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: Gloria becomes determined to earn her Queen of Kindness Kidizen badge and welcomes some free-spirited rats who need a place to stay into the habitat. Despite her discomfort, Gloria encourages the rats to make themselves at home. When the rats play with her special baby tusk at the bottom of her tank, she finally snaps and sends the rats home. It isn't until the gang winds up at the rats' nest and Gloria almost takes a slice of the rats special cheese that she learns it's okay to say no.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: When Alex realizes he’s too small to climb onto his new habitat “stage”, he feels too small for his dreams- until he hears of a big, new roller coaster at Coney Island and figures if he can ride the big coaster, that’ll prove that he’s a BIG deal! But when Alex is too short to be allowed on the ride- and his friends find themselves stuck at the top of it- Alex saves the day when he realizes that there are advantages to being small, and learns that his body is perfect just the way it is.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 4
programme.desc: When a young mother, Selonia Reed, 26, is found brutally murdered in her car, detectives turn over every rock in small-town Hammond, Louisiana, in search of her killer.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: As summer rolls on, the police officers try to keep the Lake of the Ozarks community safe. Detective Sergeant Mark Kordula gets called to the aid of a bloodied and concussed bar patron lying in the road.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S16) - EP 126
programme.desc: In Tulsa, two men are murdered in a parking lot, but a gun from another shooting incident leads detectives to their suspect. As prosecutors prepare for the trial, key evidence goes missing.

programme.title: Mas Selamat, The Fugitive Terrorist
programme.desc: The escape of an Indonesian-born Jemaah Islamiah terrorist sparked one of Singapore's largest manhunts, before he was finally found in Malaysia.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5) - EP 134
programme.desc: A defendant strips naked and shadowboxes during his hearing; the family of a murder victim attacks the defendant in court; a convicted gunman begs for forgiveness from a victim's family; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5) - EP 135
programme.desc: A grieving uncle screams at his sister-in-law in court over his missing nephew; an autoworker checks in to his virtual hearing from the assembly line; a road rage killer blames his victim; and more.

programme.title: First Blood (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: African-American women in the Mt Pleasant neighbourhood of Cleveland were vanishing. Their families cried for help, but no one knew what was happening. No one except Anthony Sowell.

programme.title: The Garden City Butcher
programme.desc: Passing himself off as a friendly tourist in Singapore, he preyed on unsuspecting travellers, bludgeoning them to death before disposing their chopped up bodies.

programme.title: The Braemar Hill Murders
programme.desc: In April 1985, two western teenagers studying in Hong Kong were set upon by a gang of Chinese youths, who proceeded to torture and stab them to death.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Detective Maurice Stewart investigates the murder of a 15-year-old boy who was gunned down after walking his younger sister home.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: With the help of Det. Johnson and Det Stewart, Det. Diesburg pieces together what happened one Saturday afternoon when two young men opened fire on two teens driving down the street.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6) - EP 6
programme.desc: Kim Edwards and Lucas Markham were both outsiders from troubled homes. They felt they understood each other when no one else did. Together they made a plan to get rid of the mum and sister Kim resented.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S5) - EP 5
programme.desc: A painful breakup ends in tragedy when a correctional officer fatally wounds his ex-girlfriend. The prosecution say he's a killer, but the defence argues he was under attack and shot in self-defence.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16) - EP 11
programme.desc: Angel's life has spiralled as unchecked shopping habits have taken over her finances and her home. With reduced work hours but persistent spending, her home is now dangerously overcrowded.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16) - EP 12
programme.desc: A burst water pipe above her living room threatens to worsen conditions, with water soaking into piles of clothes and other items, creating a breeding ground for mould.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: From Taiwan to Singapore, addicted gamblers bet on anything and everything, with ruthless bookies using extortion to ensure payment.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: The Krystal-9 gang in Malaysia would ruthlessly resort to blackmail, extortion, kidnapping and torture against those who can't repay their debts.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It? - EP 9
programme.desc: An unlicensed midwife assists a home birth that ends in tragedy. The defence says she made the right calls, but the prosecution charges her with negligent child abuse resulting in death.

programme.title: Expedition Killer Whale S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: In Antarctica, the most sophisticated hunting behaviour in the animal kingdom takes place - killer whales creating waves to wash seals off pieces of floating ice. A team of scientists and filmmakers travel to these freezing waters to find out more about these unique animals and how they do it. And one of the scientists is looking for one killer whale in particular. But their mission is not just to deepen our understanding of this extraordinary hunting behaviour.

programme.title: Amazing Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles S02 - EP 2
programme.desc: Nick nicknames his new adventure 'The Volcano Express' as he is travelling from Mount Vesuvius to Mount Etna on a journey from Naples to Sicily.

programme.title: Earth S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Earth's terrifying journey into the deep freeze starts with fire, not ice. 800 million years ago, long before the age of the dinosaurs, before there was even animal life, the giant supercontinent Rodinia breaks up. Earth's vast powerful tectonic forces rip the land apart, kicking off a series of events that results in huge amounts of carbon dioxide being sucked from the atmosphere and sending global temperatures plummeting.

programme.title: The Last Overland S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: The team travel through Azerbaijan, Georgia and Turkey, where they re-join the First Overland route at last. Now it's a road-race through Europe to be home in time for Christmas.

programme.title: The Green Planet S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Deserts are hostile to life. Temperatures soar and plummet and water is rare. Yet even here plants have found ingenious ways to survive.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet S01 - EP 1

Below the sea ice, conditions have been stable for millennia.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Asia is the largest and most extreme continent on our planet, stretching from the Arctic Circle in the north to the tropical forests on the equator. The animals here face the hottest deserts, tallest jungles and highest mountains found anywhere on Earth. But the continent has not always looked like this. These extreme worlds were created when India collided with the rest of Asia 30 million years ago, shaping the continent as we know it today. Animals here have adapted to the extreme environments

programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: Back Roads S12 - EP 5
programme.desc: Take a spin around the maypole with guest presenter, Paul West, at the world's second largest Cornish festival, Kernewek Lowender, on South Australia's Copper Coast.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Moments S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: A journey back in time charting the plight of Australia's most iconic wild inhabitants as we've challenged them, and sometimes they've challenged us.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: In this peep behind Bega's factory doors, Dr Karl learns how cheese is made... and it would appear that he knows more about String Theory, than he does string cheese. (Final)

programme.title: Play On S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Migrant families and athletes of multicultural heritage are changing Australia's sporting culture. From social sport to elite athletes, Paul Kennedy examines how sport helps build community, identity and opportunity.

programme.title: The World (2026) - EP 102
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 130

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 130
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings (2026) - EP 130

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: German in a Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let’s learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for “happiness” and various forms of “joy” through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 67 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 129
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 68 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.desc: A trip without a purpose, just go on a whim, so simple, are you willing to join us? A journey that witnesses the friendship of men begins!Let's go! Bring a simple bag, ride a hot-blooded motorcycle, and have fun traveling and charging.

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 526
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational valu

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 24
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse. LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead.

programme.title: The Driving Power - EP 20
programme.desc: MUI (CHENG SIU CHOW, ADAM) is a middle-aged man who has never had a proper job. Throughout his life, he has been relying on his family and living like a playboy. His biggest achievements are marrying a singer, YUNG (YIP TUNG, CECILIA) and raising their daughter CHU (YE MICHELLE). MUI and YUNG love each other very much even after being married for more than 20 years. However, deep down, MUI is still a playboy.

programme.title: Communion - EP 8
programme.desc: After getting divorced, Au Yiu-cho (Kwok Chun On) and Tang Lai-kuen (Alice Chan) operate two restaurants coincidentally called Yuet Tak House in Hong Kong and on the mainland respectively. They never have issues with each other. In 2022, Lai-kuen abruptly returns to Hong Kong to open a branch. She even declares she wants to obtain the rights to the Yuet Tak House trademark through legal channels.

programme.title: Guts of Man - EP 13
programme.desc: TUNG FEI (CHAN KIN FUNG, SAMMUL) ignores his late father’s last will and sneaks out of the Taohua Village, where he grew up, without his sister LAM’s (KOI MING FAI, JOYCE) knowing it. He meets a fisherman’s son SHEUNG FOON (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) on the way. He and FOON travel to the Qiantang River to see the tides. They meet a tycoon’s daughter YING HIU SUET (CHO, MANDY LEE) and FEI falls in love with her at first sight.

programme.title: Provocateur - EP 8
programme.desc: Following deaths of his first and second wife, cosmetic mogul CHEUK KWAN-LAM (Gallen Lo), who is left alone living with his step-daughter CHEUK MAN-LEI (Jacqueline Wong), tries to turn over a new leaf. As fate would have it, he encounters a resourceful young man called POON SIU-KIT (Fred Cheng), through whom he sees a younger version of himself, so he cannot help developing a kindly feeling for him.

As fate would have it, he encounters a resourceful young man called POON SIU-KIT (Fred Cheng), through whom he sees a younger version of himself, so he cannot help developing a kindly feeling for him.

programme.title: Provocateur - EP 11
programme.desc: Following deaths of his first and second wife, cosmetic mogul CHEUK KWAN-LAM (Gallen Lo), who is left alone living with his step-daughter CHEUK MAN-LEI (Jacqueline Wong), tries to turn over a new leaf. As fate would have it, he encounters a resourceful young man called POON SIU-KIT (Fred Cheng), through whom he sees a younger version of himself, so he cannot help developing a kindly feeling for him.

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 25
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse. LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead.

programme.title: My Unfair Lady - EP 1
programme.desc: Career driven LING MAN (Jessica Hester Hsuan) is a property management executive with a golden touch, and the shopping malls under her leadership have won many awards. She is also a control freak. As her number one assistant, her cousin LING YU-KEN (Natalie Tong) is totally under her thumb and hard-working. She learns to flirt superficially, helping LING MAN smooth over many problems. Just as LING MAN is looking forward to moving up the company to be appointed to the board of directors, the comp

programme.title: Communion - EP 9
programme.desc: After getting divorced, Au Yiu-cho (Kwok Chun On) and Tang Lai-kuen (Alice Chan) operate two restaurants coincidentally called Yuet Tak House in Hong Kong and on the mainland respectively. They never have issues with each other. In 2022, Lai-kuen abruptly returns to Hong Kong to open a branch. She even declares she wants to obtain the rights to the Yuet Tak House trademark through legal channels.

programme.title: Guts of Man - EP 14
programme.desc: TUNG FEI (CHAN KIN FUNG, SAMMUL) ignores his late father’s last will and sneaks out of the Taohua Village, where he grew up, without his sister LAM’s (KOI MING FAI, JOYCE) knowing it. He meets a fisherman’s son SHEUNG FOON (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) on the way. He and FOON travel to the Qiantang River to see the tides. They meet a tycoon’s daughter YING HIU SUET (CHO, MANDY LEE) and FEI falls in love with her at first sight.

programme.title: Provocateur - EP 10
programme.desc: Following deaths of his first and second wife, cosmetic mogul CHEUK KWAN-LAM (Gallen Lo), who is left alone living with his step-daughter CHEUK MAN-LEI (Jacqueline Wong), tries to turn over a new leaf. As fate would have it, he encounters a resourceful young man called POON SIU-KIT (Fred Cheng), through whom he sees a younger version of himself, so he cannot help developing a kindly feeling for him.

programme.desc: Following deaths of his first and second wife, cosmetic mogul CHEUK KWAN-LAM (Gallen Lo), who is left alone living with his step-daughter CHEUK MAN-LEI (Jacqueline Wong), tries to turn over a new leaf. As fate would have it, he encounters a resourceful young man called POON SIU-KIT (Fred Cheng), through whom he sees a younger version of himself, so he cannot help developing a kindly feeling for him.

programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse. LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead.

She is also a control freak. As her number one assistant, her cousin LING YU-KEN (Natalie Tong) is totally under her thumb and hard-working. She learns to flirt superficially, helping LING MAN smooth over many problems. Just as LING MAN is looking forward to moving up the company to be appointed to the board of directors, the comp
